title.value: Development of a Generation/Expression System of Narratives in the Style of a Folk Tale, KOSERUBE Version 1
title.evidence:
# 民話風物語生成・表現システムKOSERUBE第一版 $	extcircled{7}$ 開発

# Development of a Generation/Expression System of Narratives in the Style of a Folk Tale, KOSERUBE Version 1

authors.evidence:
秋元 泰介 岩手県立大学大学院ソフトウェア情報学研究科
Taisuke Akimoto Graduate School of Software and Information Science, Iwate Prefectural University...
小方 孝 岩手県立大学ソフトウェア情報学部
Takashi Ogata Faculty of Software and Information Science, Iwate Prefectural University

year.evidence: この研究は、2012年6月11日に行われたワークショップで発表された。

abstract.value: KOSERUBE (version 1) is a system that automatically generates stories and discourses in the style of a folk tale with its characters, places and objects relating to Iwate Prefecture. The system also expresses sentences and music, and automatically edits visual objects relating to the generated narratives. The user can operate and appreciate the process through a visual interface. In the context of our narrative generation system research, KOSERUBE mainly uses Propp-based story grammar as the major automatic generation mechanism. In this paper, first, we give a system overview covering the user interface and the narrative generation mechanism depending on Propp-based story grammar. Next, we present the results of a questionnaire survey and a demonstration at an exhibition to identify relevant issues and discuss the expansion of the system to the second version.
abstract.evidence: KOSERUBE (version 1) is a system that automatically generates stories and discourses in the style of a folk tale with its characters, places and objects relating to Iwate Prefecture...

venue.evidence: 山口情報芸術センターで行われたメディアと AI に関するワークショップ（人工知能学会主催，2012年6月11日）において，KOSERUBEの展示を行った。

keywords.evidence: keywords: integrated narrative generation system, KOSERUBE, Propp-based story grammar, music generation

narrative_generation_mechanism.value: The KOSERUBE system utilizes a Propp-based story grammar to automatically generate narratives, integrating various narrative elements such as characters, settings, and plot structures. This mechanism allows for the creation of coherent folk tales that reflect cultural aspects of Iwate Prefecture.
narrative_generation_mechanism.evidence: KOSERUBE mainly uses Propp-based story grammar as the major automatic generation mechanism...
narrative_generation_mechanism.notes: Propp's theory provides a structural framework for narrative generation.

user_interface.value: KOSERUBE features a visual interface that allows users to interactively select characters, story types, and narrators, facilitating a personalized storytelling experience.
user_interface.evidence: ユーザが物語のパターンや登場人物等を選択すると，システムは，それをもとに物語の概念表現，文表現及び音楽を自動生成し...
user_interface.notes: The interface enhances user engagement by allowing customization.

positive_feedback: The interface was easy to use.
The music matched the folk tale theme.
The variety of characters was appreciated.
negative_feedback: There were abrupt jumps in the story.
The music could be more diverse.
questionnaire_results.evidence: アンケート調査の結果、物語の生成過程・結果の面白さや分かり易さに関する反応を調査した。
questionnaire_results.notes: Feedback indicates areas for improvement in narrative coherence.

demonstration_results.value: The demonstration at the workshop garnered positive reactions, especially from children, who engaged enthusiastically with the interactive elements of KOSERUBE.
demonstration_results.evidence: 特に子供が多く集まり，登場人物選択に関する興味，舞台上演中スクリーン前に立っての物語への熱心な参加等...
demonstration_results.notes: Demonstration success highlights the system's appeal to younger audiences.

identified_issues: Narrative consistency and naturalness need improvement.
User feedback indicated issues with abrupt narrative jumps.
The complexity of narratives may overwhelm users.
future_research_directions: Implement mechanisms for managing narrative consistency.
Investigate the integration of more diverse multimedia elements.
discussion.evidence: One of the important issues identified is the processing of the narratives for consistency and naturalness.
discussion.notes: Future directions aim to enhance narrative quality and user experience.
